Judaeo-Arabic (isolated Arabic vocalisation)
Hebrew (sporadic Tiberian vocalisation)
description: Letter of condolence from Ḥalfon b. Menashshe (fl. 1100-1138 CE) to his brother-in-law Abū l-Ḥasan ʿAlī b. Hilāl (=ʿEli b. Hillel) al-Ḥazzan al-Baghdādī. Headed by 'בשמ' רחמ and four lines of biblical quotations. Halfon reports that Sitt al-Gharb was very sick for 13 days and died on Wednesday, the 17th of [...] and was buried on Thursday. (Information in part from CUDL.) Join: Oded Zinger. NB: Goitein's index card does not seem to belong here.
tags: Illness, condolence, Illness: women's, Halfon b. Menashshe, grief, illness letter 969-1517
description_he: מכתב תנחומים מחלפון בן מנשה לגיסו אבו אל-חסן עלי בן הלאל, החזן הבגדאדי; מדווח שסת אל-ע'רב חלתה 13 יום ונפטרה ביום ד' ה-17 ב-[...] ונקברה ביום ה'
